creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
According to https://www.freedesktop.org/software/colord/download.html versions 1.3.x are development ones. May be they may be used as [a new port] graphics/colord-devel.

As for the stable branch of colord it also has a new version 1.2.12. I'll open a new PR when patches are ready.

Closing this PR, because I did not intend to create a devel version of the port.
